items.claim: Conor McGregor utilizes a high-pressure, forward-moving striking style that forces opponents to react.
items.quote: He stalks guys so hard. He pressures them so hard. He's ready to push off his front foot and he's ready to just sting you.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's lack of consistent kicking training during his boxing-focused period reduced the durability of his leg bones.
items.quote: if you're not kicking the bag and you're not kicking things consistently, I don't think your your your your bones aren't as strong.

items.claim: Conor McGregor entered the fight with a pre-existing stress fracture in his ankle.
items.quote: he was talking about before this he had a stress fracture in that leg already.

items.claim: Conor McGregor possesses a high-level, dangerous spinning kick.
items.quote: He's got a deadly spin kick.

items.claim: Max Holloway undergoes an extreme weight cut from approximately 180 pounds to 145 pounds.
items.quote: Max Holloway probably starts camp around 180, 79 maybe he starts camp. Suck your deplete your body completely.

items.claim: A five-year layoff is a significant concern for a fighter's performance.
items.quote: When you're out for 5 years, that's the thing that scares me.
